title: System tests: clean up unit file leaks
body:
Quadlet tests and some systemd tests leak unit files, as
reported by 'systemctl list-units --failed'. Clean them up.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Before commiting these workaround can we give some time to actually fix #24351?

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24358 should fix the startup leak.

As for the quadlet leaks I guess it is expected there (units are managed by the tests not podman) so the fix to call reset-failed on the quadlet units seems correct to me
